title: harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. sublobatum
intro: Harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. sublobatum, commonly known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to southern Africa, belonging to the Pedaliaceae family. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, pain-relieving, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving arthritis, migraines, and digestive problems, as well as reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality. Harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. sublobatum is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
